headline: Oil Declines After US-Iran Peace Talks Show Signs of Progress
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Oil dropped following signs of progress in peace talks between Washington and Tehran, which appeared to get off to a rocky start after US President Donald Trump issued a fresh threat against Iran.Most Read from BloombergIran Says Hormuz Closed Again as Talks With US Set to OpenUS and Iran Make ‘Progress’ in Talks, Aim to Keep Hormuz OpenIranian Negotiators Said to Still Be Engaged in Talks With USDOJ Rejects Judge Request to Certify $1.8 Billion Fund NixedTrump’s Fears About Econo
